narrative:
Lincolnview Local Sd (Vanwert) school district has 3,060 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.5 percentage points.
